_comment: The REAL game's main characters. Not exploring skeletons anymore — the human skeleton is fixed. Exactly two characters: default_boy and default_girl, each generated as a persistent 8-direction static PixelLab character (create-character-with-8-directions). No animations, no outfits — just the awesome 8-direction base model. If a character folder is deleted, the loop regenerates it as a fresh, slightly different variation (a new seed), so you can reroll until happy.
style_base: beautiful appealing RPG pixel-art hero character in the exact style of Grave Seasons and Stardew Valley, charming expressive face, clean readable low-detail pixels, warm cohesive palette, a single centered full-body character on a transparent background

budget._comment: Low floor — this is only two cheap characters; it can run on the last of the shared pool / usd credits.

characters.default_boy: a handsome young man, the male hero of the game, a warm friendly determined face and kind eyes, tousled brown hair, athletic build, wearing a rugged adventurer's outfit — a green tunic, brown trousers and sturdy leather boots
characters.default_girl: a beautiful young woman, the female hero of the game, a warm confident smile and bright eyes, long flowing auburn hair, graceful build, wearing a charming adventurer's outfit — a blue blouse, a practical skirt and leather boots
